case_title: HEE CHUL CHUNG VS. SUN SIK KIM

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-08-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, SUN SIK
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2023 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHUNG, HEE CHUL AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, SUN SIK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHUNG, HEE CHUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIM, SUN SIK $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,065.00, PLEASE SEE ATTACHED MC-025 JUDGMENT FORM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, SUN SIK
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER.(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY CHUNG, HEE CHUL KIM, SUN SIK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-20-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-20-2023 BY JUDGE PANG LY. PLAINTIFF HEE CHUL CHUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SUN SIK KIM IS PRESENT AND REQUESTS COURT TO PROVIDE A KOREAN INTERPRETER. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ARE BOTH ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED KOREAN INTERPRETER TED KIM (#300380). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY CHUNG, HEE CHUL AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, SUN SIK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-20-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
